description: Expected results for forbidden index in ChecksumModule test

expected_messages.description: ModuleCheck Start accepted (size=0 is valid for ModuleCheck mode)
ChecksumModule with bad index dropped silently (no response expected)
Final end_ack must be Status_Error because checksumIndex stayed empty after the filter rejected the bad index

validation_rules.session_consistency: All messages share the same session ID
validation_rules.response_format: End_ack status=1 (Status_Error) confirms the ChecksumModule filter is applied AND that the ModuleCheck downstream branch reacts correctly to an empty checksumIndex
